TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Conv-talking_tamih_panay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: mi nukay a maemin kiya wawa isu.
S.PHON: mi nukaj a maəmin kija wawa isu.
S.FORM: mi nukay a maemin kiya wawa isu.
S.PHON: mi nukaj a maəmin kija wawa isu.
S.TRANSL: 妳的小孩都回來了嗎?
Did all your children come home?

S.FORM: awaay minukay u mikadafuaytu cangra ira kuni minukay itira i timul.
S.PHON: awaaj minukaj u mikaɬ~ɮafuajtu ʦaŋra ira kuni minukaj itira i timuɾ.
S.FORM: awaay minukay u mikadafuaytu cangra ira kuni minukay itira i timul.
S.PHON: awaaj minukaj u mikaɬ~ɮafuajtu ʦaŋra ira kuni minukaj itira i timuɾ.

TRANSL.notes: 沒有回來,她們都嫁了,回到南邊(男方)的家.

S.TRANSL: 沒有回來,她們都嫁了,回到南邊 的家.

TRANSL.notes: (No,) they didn't. They are all married and returned to the hometown of their spouse in the south.

S.TRANSL: they didn't. They are all married and returned to the hometown of their spouse in the south.

S.FORM: itira i pikadafuan nira a ca'ay pinukay tayni i luma' ira inacila milisu' patikutu tayra.
S.PHON: itira i pikaɬ~ɮafuan nira a ʦaʡaj pinukaj tajni i ɾumaʡ ira inaʦiɾa miɾisuʡ patikutu tajra.
S.FORM: itira i pikadafuan nira a ca'ay pinukay tayni i luma' ira inacila milisu' patikutu tayra.
S.PHON: itira i pikaɬ~ɮafuan nira a ʦaʡaj pinukaj tajni i ɾumaʡ ira inaʦiɾa miɾisuʡ patikutu tajra.
S.TRANSL: 回到夫婿的家.T: 啊,沒回到家來嗎?P: 昨天有回來拜訪之後就回去了.

TRANSL.notes: To the home of their spouse. Oh, didn't (they) come home? Yesterday, they visited, (but) left (right away).

S.TRANSL: To the home of their spouse. Oh, didn't come home? Yesterday, they visited, left .

S.FORM: en latek anudafak dadaya iratu cangra tayni ah maherektu kamu tayra i tadem.
S.PHON: ən ɾatək anuɬ~ɮafak ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja iratu ʦaŋra tajni aħ maħərəktu kamu tajra i taɬ~ɮəm.
S.FORM: en latek anudafak dadaya iratu cangra tayni ah maherektu kamu tayra i tadem.
S.PHON: ən ɾatək anuɬ~ɮafak ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja iratu ʦaŋra tajni aħ maħərəktu kamu tajra i taɬ~ɮəm.
S.TRANSL: 可能明天晚上又回來了. 妳們掃墓結束了嗎?

TRANSL.notes: They would probably come (again) tomorrow night. Oh, have you finished (cleaning up your ancestors') tombs?

S.TRANSL: They would probably come tomorrow night. Oh, have you finished tombs?

S.FORM: cah caho caho misanga matayal anini tunu tadem kami icila misangatu miliyaw tu tadem niya wina tiya mama.
S.PHON: ʦaħ ʦaħo~u ʦaħo~u misaŋa matajaɾ anini tunu taɬ~ɮəm kami iʦiɾa misaŋatu miɾijaw tu taɬ~ɮəm nija wina tija mama.
S.FORM: cah caho caho misanga matayal anini tunu tadem kami icila misangatu miliyaw tu tadem niya wina tiya mama.
S.PHON: ʦaħ ʦaħo~u ʦaħo~u misaŋa matajaɾ anini tunu taɬ~ɮəm kami iʦiɾa misaŋatu miɾijaw tu taɬ~ɮəm nija wina tija mama.
S.TRANSL: 還沒,我們現在還在整理墳墓.幾天前我們整理、翻修媽媽爸爸的墳墓.
Not yet, we're still cleaning. A few days ago we cleaned Mother's and Father's tombs.

S.FORM: a mapela' kiya sulafu nira haw cinanum ku laluma.
S.PHON: a mapəɾaʡ kija suɾafu nira ħaw ʦinanum ku ɾaɾuma.
S.FORM: a mapela' kiya sulafu nira haw cinanum ku laluma.
S.PHON: a mapəɾaʡ kija suɾafu nira ħaw ʦinanum ku ɾaɾuma.
S.TRANSL: 鋼筋水泥裂了,水滲進裡面了.
The cement cracked and so water leaked inside.

S.FORM: hai mahaen mapela' kiya niyam.
S.PHON: ħai maħaən mapəɾaʡ kija nijam.
S.FORM: hai mahaen mapela' kiya niyam.
S.PHON: ħai maħaən mapəɾaʡ kija nijam.
S.TRANSL: 是的,一樣,我們的也裂了.
Right, ours also cracked.

S.FORM: miliyaw kami icila sa.
S.PHON: miɾijaw kami iʦiɾa sa.
S.FORM: miliyaw kami icila sa.
S.PHON: miɾijaw kami iʦiɾa sa.
S.TRANSL: 我們前幾天翻修.
We have started to work a few days ago.

S.FORM: misanga'an milepuntu anini haw han pipaherek han mipacuk tu fafuy.
S.PHON: misaŋaʡan miɾəpuntu anini ħaw ħan pipaħərək ħan mipaʦuk tu fafuj.
S.FORM: misanga'an milepuntu anini haw han pipaherek han mipacuk tu fafuy.
S.PHON: misaŋaʡan miɾəpuntu anini ħaw ħan pipaħərək ħan mipaʦuk tu fafuj.

TRANSL.notes: 今天要完工了.工作完成,趁這個機會(子女都回來),我們今天要殺豬.

S.TRANSL: 今天要完工了.工作完成,趁這個機會 ,我們今天要殺豬.

TRANSL.notes: We should be able to finish today. Once we are done, we will kill a pig (today).

S.TRANSL: We should be able to finish today. Once we are done, we will kill a pig .

S.FORM: ho fangcal kira.
S.PHON: ħo~u faŋʦaɾ kira.
S.FORM: ho fangcal kira.
S.PHON: ħo~u faŋʦaɾ kira.
S.TRANSL: 哦,很好阿.
Good!

S.FORM: hay.
S.PHON: ħaj.
S.FORM: hay.
S.PHON: ħaj.
S.TRANSL: 是的.
Right!

S.FORM: ya maherektu i dafak caho.
S.PHON: ja maħərəktu i ɬ~ɮafak ʦaħo~u.
S.FORM: ya maherektu i dafak caho.
S.PHON: ja maħərəktu i ɬ~ɮafak ʦaħo~u.
S.TRANSL: 早上做好了嗎,還沒好嗎?
Have you finished this morning?

S.FORM: mamalepun anini sa'an.
S.PHON: mamaɾəpun anini saʡan.
S.FORM: mamalepun anini sa'an.
S.PHON: mamaɾəpun anini saʡan.
S.TRANSL: 今天說是會完成.
We would finish today.

S.FORM: sa mipacuk anini mipacuktu i dafak ya fafuy.
S.PHON: sa mipaʦuk anini mipaʦuktu i ɬ~ɮafak ja fafuj.
S.FORM: sa mipacuk anini mipacuktu i dafak ya fafuy.
S.PHON: sa mipaʦuk anini mipaʦuktu i ɬ~ɮafak ja fafuj.
S.TRANSL: 所以今天要殺豬,早上就殺了.
We already killed a pig this morning.

S.FORM: a a fangcal kira.
S.PHON: a a faŋʦaɾ kira.
S.FORM: a a fangcal kira.
S.PHON: a a faŋʦaɾ kira.
S.TRANSL: 喔,那很好阿.
That's good.

S.FORM: ya ci aciang a ci namuh kura citudungay mi'aca tuya fafuy.
S.PHON: ja ʦi aʦiaŋ a ʦi namuħ kura ʦituɬ~ɮuŋaj miʡaʦa tuja fafuj.
S.FORM: ya ci aciang a ci namuh kura citudungay mi'aca tuya fafuy.
S.PHON: ja ʦi aʦiaŋ a ʦi namuħ kura ʦituɬ~ɮuŋaj miʡaʦa tuja fafuj.
S.TRANSL: Aciang跟Namuh負責買那頭豬.
Aciang and Namuh bought the pig.

S.FORM: XXXX sa ati'han ni ofad malahok cangra itira malahok.
S.PHON: xxxx sa atiʡħan ni o~ufaɬ~ɮ maɾaħo~uk ʦaŋra itira maɾaħo~uk.
S.FORM: XXXX sa ati'han ni ofad malahok cangra itira malahok.
S.PHON: xxxx sa atiʡħan ni o~ufaɬ~ɮ maɾaħo~uk ʦaŋra itira maɾaħo~uk.
S.TRANSL: 所以Ofad叫他們吃午餐,就在那邊吃了.

TRANSL.notes: Ofad invited them (for lunch) there.

S.TRANSL: Ofad invited them there.

S.FORM: i honi hai.
S.PHON: i ħo~uni ħai.
S.FORM: i honi hai.
S.PHON: i ħo~uni ħai.
S.TRANSL: 剛才嗎? 是阿.
Just now? Right!

S.FORM: ha a tayraho malafi anuhoni.
S.PHON: ħa a tajraħo~u maɾafi anuħo~uni.
S.FORM: ha a tayraho malafi anuhoni.
S.PHON: ħa a tajraħo~u maɾafi anuħo~uni.
S.TRANSL: 等一下還要去哪裡吃晚餐?

TRANSL.notes: So (you're) going there for dinner later?

S.TRANSL: So going there for dinner later?

S.FORM: o XXXX fangcal kira m anudafak kami a tayra tu niyam patien tiya patademan a pipatademan.
S.PHON: o~u xxxx faŋʦaɾ kira m anuɬ~ɮafak kami a tajra tu nijam patiən tija pataɬ~ɮəman a pipataɬ~ɮəman.
S.FORM: o XXXX fangcal kira m anudafak kami a tayra tu niyam patien tiya patademan a pipatademan.
S.PHON: o~u xxxx faŋʦaɾ kira m anuɬ~ɮafak kami a tajra tu nijam patiən tija pataɬ~ɮəman a pipataɬ~ɮəman.
S.TRANSL: 我們的是明天早上八點去墳墓. 去掃墓嗎?

TRANSL.notes: We are going (to clean up) the tombs at 8 o'clock tomorrow. To (clean up) the tombs?

S.TRANSL: We are going the tombs at 8 o'clock tomorrow. To the tombs?

S.FORM: nawhani.
S.PHON: nawħani.
S.FORM: nawhani.
S.PHON: nawħani.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼呢?
Why?

S.FORM: awa ku limaw nuya a wawa.
S.PHON: awa ku ɾimaw nuja a wawa.
S.FORM: awa ku limaw nuya a wawa.
S.PHON: awa ku ɾimaw nuja a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那些小孩沒有時間回來.
The children don't have time to come home.

S.FORM: a i honi a minukay ca nufu na i pusung.
S.PHON: a i ħo~uni a minukaj ʦa nufu na i pusuŋ.
S.FORM: a i honi a minukay ca nufu na i pusung.
S.PHON: a i ħo~uni a minukaj ʦa nufu na i pusuŋ.
S.TRANSL: Nufu一家人剛剛從台東回來.

TRANSL.notes: Nufu (and his family) just came from Taitung.

S.TRANSL: Nufu just came from Taitung.

S.FORM: ca ca hekaw i awa minukay.
S.PHON: ʦa ʦa ħəkaw i awa minukaj.
S.FORM: ca ca hekaw i awa minukay.
S.PHON: ʦa ʦa ħəkaw i awa minukaj.
S.TRANSL: Hekaw一家人沒有回來嗎?
Didn't Hekaw come home?

S.FORM: a ca'ay pinukay cingra awa ku limaw.
S.PHON: a ʦaʡaj pinukaj ʦiŋra awa ku ɾimaw.
S.FORM: a ca'ay pinukay cingra awa ku limaw.
S.PHON: a ʦaʡaj pinukaj ʦiŋra awa ku ɾimaw.
S.TRANSL: 他沒回來,沒有時間.

TRANSL.notes: (They) didn't come home; they didn't have time.

S.TRANSL: didn't come home; they didn't have time.

S.FORM: XXXX m ca'ay karolay kisu tu kapihiya.
S.PHON: xxxx m ʦaʡaj karo~uɾaj kisu tu kapiħija.
S.FORM: XXXX m ca'ay karolay kisu tu kapihiya.
S.PHON: xxxx m ʦaʡaj karo~uɾaj kisu tu kapiħija.
S.TRANSL: 做這一件事你不會累嗎?
Aren't you tired doing this?

S.FORM: hai maulah kaku mi tengil.
S.PHON: ħai mauɾaħ kaku mi təŋiɾ.
S.FORM: hai maulah kaku mi tengil.
S.PHON: ħai mauɾaħ kaku mi təŋiɾ.
S.TRANSL: 不會,我喜歡聽.
No, I like to listen.

S.FORM: hai i fangcal.
S.PHON: ħai i faŋʦaɾ.
S.FORM: hai i fangcal.
S.PHON: ħai i faŋʦaɾ.
S.TRANSL: 那很好.
That's good.

S.FORM: edeng nika mafukil tu nu holam a misaheci.
S.PHON: əɬ~ɮəŋ nika mafukiɾ tu nu ħo~uɾam a misaħəʦi.
S.FORM: edeng nika mafukil tu nu holam a misaheci.
S.PHON: əɬ~ɮəŋ nika mafukiɾ tu nu ħo~uɾam a misaħəʦi.
S.TRANSL: 只是,不會用漢語解釋.
But I can't explain in Chinese.

S.FORM: anu ira kura kafukilan hang ca maten u kira XXXX maten matenes mi saliyaliyaw sumuwal hai.
S.PHON: anu ira kura kafukiɾan ħaŋ ʦa matən u kira xxxx matən matənəs mi saɾijaɾijaw sumuwaɾ ħai.
S.FORM: anu ira kura kafukilan hang ca maten u kira XXXX maten matenes mi saliyaliyaw sumuwal hai.
S.PHON: anu ira kura kafukiɾan ħaŋ ʦa matən u kira xxxx matən matənəs mi saɾijaɾijaw sumuwaɾ ħai.
S.TRANSL: 如果有不會的地方,持續反反覆覆的說,是不是?
If there is something I don't know, lots of repetitions, right?

S.FORM: hai kaku ma mahaen.
S.PHON: ħai kaku ma maħaən.
S.FORM: hai kaku ma mahaen.
S.PHON: ħai kaku ma maħaən.
S.TRANSL: 我也是.
Me too.

S.FORM: kaku mafana' kaku tu nu kaping haw matini matini sa'an cangra haw.
S.PHON: kaku mafanaʡ kaku tu nu kapiŋ ħaw matini matini saʡan ʦaŋra ħaw.
S.FORM: kaku mafana' kaku tu nu kaping haw matini matini sa'an cangra haw.
S.PHON: kaku mafanaʡ kaku tu nu kapiŋ ħaw matini matini saʡan ʦaŋra ħaw.
S.TRANSL: 我雖然會說國語,他們說「這樣子、這樣子」.

TRANSL.notes: Although I know Mandarin, (they) would say, 'Like this? Like this?'.

S.TRANSL: Although I know Mandarin, would say, 'Like this? Like this?'.

S.FORM: ira kura kafana'an aku haw.
S.PHON: ira kura kafanaʡan aku ħaw.
S.FORM: ira kura kafana'an aku haw.
S.PHON: ira kura kafanaʡan aku ħaw.
S.TRANSL: 有我所知道的.

TRANSL.notes: There are some (answers) that I know.

S.TRANSL: There are some that I know.

S.FORM: roma anu mafukil kaku misaharaterateng haw ca'ay kangaay matini sa cangra haw.
S.PHON: ro~uma anu mafukiɾ kaku misaħaratəratəŋ ħaw ʦaʡaj kaŋaaj matini sa ʦaŋra ħaw.
S.FORM: roma anu mafukil kaku misaharaterateng haw ca'ay kangaay matini sa cangra haw.
S.PHON: ro~uma anu mafukiɾ kaku misaħaratəratəŋ ħaw ʦaʡaj kaŋaaj matini sa ʦaŋra ħaw.
S.TRANSL: 其次,如果有我不知道,正在思索的時候,他們說「不可以這樣子嗎?」
If I don't know and when I am thinking, they would say, 'Can't we say this?'

S.FORM: matamaitu.
S.PHON: matamaitu.
S.FORM: matamaitu.
S.PHON: matamaitu.

TRANSL.notes: 結果,答案對了(找到答案了).

S.TRANSL: 結果,答案對了 .

TRANSL.notes: And (they) had the answer.

S.TRANSL: And had the answer.

S.FORM: cangra ku patalahekaray sa haw.
S.PHON: ʦaŋra ku pataɾaħəkaraj sa ħaw.
S.FORM: cangra ku patalahekaray sa haw.
S.PHON: ʦaŋra ku pataɾaħəkaraj sa ħaw.

TRANSL.notes: 結果(將其中涵義)表達出來的人也是他們自己.

S.TRANSL: 結果 表達出來的人也是他們自己.
They found an answer by themselves.

S.FORM: a hai matira kura matama han.
S.PHON: a ħai matira kura matama ħan.
S.FORM: a hai matira kura matama han.
S.PHON: a ħai matira kura matama ħan.

TRANSL.notes: (我就會說)「是的,就是這樣,如此如此.」

S.TRANSL: 「是的,就是這樣,如此如此.」
I wouls day, 'Right, like that'.

S.FORM: ira ku maha'enay nu maku cangranan.
S.PHON: ira ku maħaʡənaj nu maku ʦaŋranan.
S.FORM: ira ku maha'enay nu maku cangranan.
S.PHON: ira ku maħaʡənaj nu maku ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: 我也有同樣的情形在他們身上.
I have the same experience.

S.FORM: a fangcal kira hai nika u nuninian kahmaw ku nuninian.
S.PHON: a faŋʦaɾ kira ħai nika u nuninian kaħmaw ku nuninian.
S.FORM: a fangcal kira hai nika u nuninian kahmaw ku nuninian.
S.PHON: a faŋʦaɾ kira ħai nika u nuninian kaħmaw ku nuninian.

TRANSL.notes: 很好啊. 是,不過這次(問題)比較簡單.

S.TRANSL: 很好啊. 是,不過這次 比較簡單.
That's good! Yes, but it's easier this time.

S.FORM: ca'ay kamatira tu nuriraw tusa tu kala kala sa satapangan aku ka'emed kununinian a misanga'an.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kamatira tu nuriraw tusa tu kaɾa kaɾa sa satapaŋan aku kaʡəməɬ~ɮ kununinian a misaŋaʡan.
S.FORM: ca'ay kamatira tu nuriraw tusa tu kala kala sa satapangan aku ka'emed kununinian a misanga'an.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kamatira tu nuriraw tusa tu kaɾa kaɾa sa satapaŋan aku kaʡəməɬ~ɮ kununinian a misaŋaʡan.

TRANSL.notes: 不像那二個人,我剛開始的時候,做這個(採集)很容易.

S.TRANSL: 不像那二個人,我剛開始的時候,做這個 很容易.

TRANSL.notes: Not like the two, when I just started, this (collecting data) is easy.

S.TRANSL: Not like the two, when I just started, this is easy.

S.FORM: anu ca ca ka tama haw anu hacuwa kura kafana'an mi hai hai anu ma pasadak han hai.
S.PHON: anu ʦa ʦa ka tama ħaw anu ħaʦuwa kura kafanaʡan mi ħai ħai anu ma pasaɬ~ɮak ħan ħai.
S.FORM: anu ca ca ka tama haw anu hacuwa kura kafana'an mi hai hai anu ma pasadak han hai.
S.PHON: anu ʦa ʦa ka tama ħaw anu ħaʦuwa kura kafanaʡan mi ħai ħai anu ma pasaɬ~ɮak ħan ħai.
S.TRANSL: 雖然答非所問,如果你了解多少,就表達出來.

TRANSL.notes: Even though (you) cannot find an answer, regardless of how much you know,(you) can express it.

S.TRANSL: Even though cannot find an answer, regardless of how much you know, can express it.

S.FORM: matatudung aca tu hati mahaen aku.
S.PHON: matatuɬ~ɮuŋ aʦa tu ħati maħaən aku.
S.FORM: matatudung aca tu hati mahaen aku.
S.PHON: matatuɬ~ɮuŋ aʦa tu ħati maħaən aku.
S.TRANSL: 如果意思很接近,剛剛好的,我也是這樣子做.
If the meaning is close, I did so too.

S.FORM: matatudungitu haw hatiraen aca aku ca'aytu kafilu kura hiya misama'ama'an kira.
S.PHON: matatuɬ~ɮuŋitu ħaw ħatiraən aʦa aku ʦaʡajtu kafiɾu kura ħija misamaʡamaʡan kira.
S.FORM: matatudungitu haw hatiraen aca aku ca'aytu kafilu kura hiya misama'ama'an kira.
S.PHON: matatuɬ~ɮuŋitu ħaw ħatiraən aʦa aku ʦaʡajtu kafiɾu kura ħija misamaʡamaʡan kira.

TRANSL.notes: (表達內涵)很接近了的時候,我是這樣子做,其他的方式也無法勝任了.

S.TRANSL: 很接近了的時候,我是這樣子做,其他的方式也無法勝任了.
If the expression is close, I do it like this, but I'm not able to help with the others.

S.FORM: u roma anu mi falicen ta misanuamis haw anu patatama anuhan ita tura suwal nu holam u roma i ku'esit a tengilen.
S.PHON: u ro~uma anu mi faɾiʦən ta misanuamis ħaw anu patatama anuħan ita tura suwaɾ nu ħo~uɾam u ro~uma i kuʡəsit a təŋiɾən.
S.FORM: u roma anu mi falicen ta misanuamis haw anu patatama anuhan ita tura suwal nu holam u roma i ku'esit a tengilen.
S.PHON: u ro~uma anu mi faɾiʦən ta misanuamis ħaw anu patatama anuħan ita tura suwaɾ nu ħo~uɾam u ro~uma i kuʡəsit a təŋiɾən.
S.TRANSL: 其次,如果我們翻譯成阿美語,如果我們硬要符合漢語的話,聽起來硬梆梆的.

TRANSL.notes: Then, if we translate it into Amis, if we have to (conform to) Chinese, (the expression would) sound awkward.

S.TRANSL: Then, if we translate it into Amis, if we have to Chinese, sound awkward.

S.FORM: mhm hai hai.
S.PHON: mħm ħai ħai.
S.FORM: mhm hai hai.
S.PHON: mħm ħai ħai.
S.TRANSL: 對.
Yes.

S.FORM: ta u roma haw i unu mita i a pafesot sa ku mita suwal kira.
S.PHON: ta u ro~uma ħaw i unu mita i a pafəso~ut sa ku mita suwaɾ kira.
S.FORM: ta u roma haw i unu mita i a pafesot sa ku mita suwal kira.
S.PHON: ta u ro~uma ħaw i unu mita i a pafəso~ut sa ku mita suwaɾ kira.
S.TRANSL: 我們的話很直接.
Our style of expression is more direct.

S.FORM: hai.
S.PHON: ħai.
S.FORM: hai.
S.PHON: ħai.
S.TRANSL: 沒錯
Yes.

S.FORM: saka anu icuwaay kura ka'emeday i sa'an hai ma matiratu hatira a hatira aca kura pi hiya.
S.PHON: saka anu iʦuwaaj kura kaʡəməɬ~ɮaj i saʡan ħai ma matiratu ħatira a ħatira aʦa kura pi ħija.
S.FORM: saka anu icuwaay kura ka'emeday i sa'an hai ma matiratu hatira a hatira aca kura pi hiya.
S.PHON: saka anu iʦuwaaj kura kaʡəməɬ~ɮaj i saʡan ħai ma matiratu ħatira a ħatira aʦa kura pi ħija.
S.TRANSL: 如果哪個地方比較簡單的,僅僅如此作採集工作.
If there is an easier part, it's just like this.

S.FORM: ura patusukan nangra a minanam tunini i.
S.PHON: ura patusukan naŋra a minanam tunini i.
S.FORM: ura patusukan nangra a minanam tunini i.
S.PHON: ura patusukan naŋra a minanam tunini i.
S.TRANSL: 那個他們專程來這裡學習.
They come here to learn.

S.FORM: u sakafana'aw nangra tu sanuamisaw anu ca i u pikingkiw nira.
S.PHON: u sakafanaʡaw naŋra tu sanuamisaw anu ʦa i u pikiŋkiw nira.
S.FORM: u sakafana'aw nangra tu sanuamisaw anu ca i u pikingkiw nira.
S.PHON: u sakafanaʡaw naŋra tu sanuamisaw anu ʦa i u pikiŋkiw nira.
S.TRANSL: 他們想要學會說阿美語,如果不是的話,他們是來研究的.
They want to learn Amis; otherwise, they want to do research.

S.FORM: kingkiw nira a u pikingkiw nira hay sa kaku kira.
S.PHON: kiŋkiw nira a u pikiŋkiw nira ħaj sa kaku kira.
S.FORM: kingkiw nira a u pikingkiw nira hay sa kaku kira.
S.PHON: kiŋkiw nira a u pikiŋkiw nira ħaj sa kaku kira.
S.TRANSL: 他們做研究. 我認為是如此.
They do research. I think so.

S.FORM: hai u pikingkiw nira mi sulinga'han a mitengiltu hay.
S.PHON: ħai u pikiŋkiw nira mi suɾiŋaʡħan a mitəŋiɾtu ħaj.
S.FORM: hai u pikingkiw nira mi sulinga'han a mitengiltu hay.
S.PHON: ħai u pikiŋkiw nira mi suɾiŋaʡħan a mitəŋiɾtu ħaj.

TRANSL.notes: 是的,(目的)是研究. 詳細的聽了. 是的.

S.TRANSL: 是的, 是研究. 詳細的聽了. 是的.

TRANSL.notes: Right, for research. (They) really listen to (you). Right.

S.TRANSL: Right, for research. really listen to . Right.

S.FORM: ira ku a naw ira ku.
S.PHON: ira ku a naw ira ku.
S.FORM: ira ku a naw ira ku.
S.PHON: ira ku a naw ira ku.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼有a?
Why is there an 'a'?

S.FORM: i sa'an hai naw i ira ku.
S.PHON: i saʡan ħai naw i ira ku.
S.FORM: i sa'an hai naw i ira ku.
S.PHON: i saʡan ħai naw i ira ku.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼有i?
Why is there an 'i'?

S.FORM: hai kin naw ira ku hai mikingkiway cangra.
S.PHON: ħai kin naw ira ku ħai mikiŋkiwaj ʦaŋra.
S.FORM: hai kin naw ira ku hai mikingkiway cangra.
S.PHON: ħai kin naw ira ku ħai mikiŋkiwaj ʦaŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他們是來研究的.

TRANSL.notes: They (want to) do research.

S.TRANSL: They do research.

S.FORM: hai hai anu minanamay i ku misaliyaliyaw a sumuwal hai hai mikinkiway cingra sa.
S.PHON: ħai ħai anu minanamaj i ku misaɾijaɾijaw a sumuwaɾ ħai ħai mikinkiwaj ʦiŋra sa.
S.FORM: hai hai anu minanamay i ku misaliyaliyaw a sumuwal hai hai mikinkiway cingra sa.
S.PHON: ħai ħai anu minanamaj i ku misaɾijaɾijaw a sumuwaɾ ħai ħai mikinkiwaj ʦiŋra sa.
S.TRANSL: 是的,假如是來學習,應該不斷反覆的說. 是,他是來研究的.

TRANSL.notes: Right, if they want to learn, they have to practice many times. Yes, they (are here to) do research.

S.TRANSL: Right, if they want to learn, they have to practice many times. Yes, they do research.

S.FORM: anu ira ku anu ira ku ka anu ku i ka'ayaw i kaikur masa masasifelihitu uhuh ca'ay katatama haw.
S.PHON: anu ira ku anu ira ku ka anu ku i kaʡajaw i kaikur masa masasifəɾiħitu uħuħ ʦaʡaj katatama ħaw.
S.FORM: anu ira ku anu ira ku ka anu ku i ka'ayaw i kaikur masa masasifelihitu uhuh ca'ay katatama haw.
S.PHON: anu ira ku anu ira ku ka anu ku i kaʡajaw i kaikur masa masasifəɾiħitu uħuħ ʦaʡaj katatama ħaw.
S.TRANSL: 如果有i,如果有ka,如果ku在前,在後,前後顛倒,就不順了.
If there is an 'i', if there is a 'ka', if the order of 'ku' is reversed, it does not sound correct.

S.FORM: ca'ay kanga'ay han kira.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kaŋaʡaj ħan kira.
S.FORM: ca'ay kanga'ay han kira.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kaŋaʡaj ħan kira.
S.TRANSL: 這樣不可以.
It's not good.

S.FORM: ca'ay katatudung.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj katatuɬ~ɮuŋ.
S.FORM: ca'ay katatudung.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj katatuɬ~ɮuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 這樣不適合.
It's not good.
